zh.lifeSummary: 當Gontrade ou Guntrade de Berles-Servins於1092年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝萊-奧-波斯時，她的父親Henri de Berles28歲，母親Avicie de Servins21歲。她於1109年與Nigel d'Aubigny-en-Artois結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1151年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯奧比--亞托斯享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: ou
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Louis   or, less commonly,   Louise .

variants.name: Louisa
meanings: feminine form of   Louis  , commonly used as an English given name since the 18th century.

variants.name: Louise
meanings: feminine form of Louis , introduced to England in the 17th century. Like Louisa , it has remained perennially popular and is currently frequently used as a component of compound names such as Ella-Louise, Sophie-Louise, and Tia-Louise.

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Gontrade ou Guntrade de Berles-Servins was born in 1092, in Berles-au-Bois, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Henri de Berles, was 28 and her mother, Avicie de Servins, was 21. She married Nigel d'Aubigny-en-Artois in 1109. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1151, in Aubigny-en-Artois, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gontrade ou Guntrade de Berles-Servins est née en 1092, à Berles-au-Bois, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Henri de Berles, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Avicie de Servins, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Nigel d'Aubigny-en-Artois en 1109. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1151, à Aubigny-en-Artois, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gontrade ou Guntrade de Berles-Servins 1092 in Berles-au-Bois, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henri de Berles 28 und ihre Mutter Avicie de Servins 21. Sie hat 1109 Nigel d'Aubigny-en-Artois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1151 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Aubigny-en-Artois, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gontrade ou Guntrade de Berles-Servins è nata il nel 1092 nel Berles-au-Bois, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Henri de Berles, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Avicie de Servins, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Nigel d'Aubigny-en-Artois nel 1109. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1151, nel Aubigny-en-Artois, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gontrade ou Guntrade de Berles-Servinsが1092年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスバーレス-アウ-ボイスで生まれた時，父Henri de Berlesは28歳，母Avicie de Servinsは21歳であった。1109年にNigel d'Aubigny-en-Artoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1151年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスアウビグニー-エン-アルトイスで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gontrade ou Guntrade de Berles-Servins(이)가 1092년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 벌레스-오-보이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henri de Berles(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avicie de Servins(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1109년 Nigel d'Aubigny-en-Artois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1151년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아라스 오비그니--아르토이스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gontrade ou Guntrade de Berles-Servins nasceu em 1092, em Berles-au-Bois, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Henri de Berles, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Avicie de Servins, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Nigel d'Aubigny-en-Artois em 1109. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1151, em Aubigny-en-Artois, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gontrade ou Guntrade de Berles-Servins родилась в 1092 г. в местности бирльс-ау-боис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Henri de Berles было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Avicie de Servins, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nigel d'Aubigny-en-Artois в 1109 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1151 г. в местности аубигни-ен-артоис, аррас, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gontrade ou Guntrade de Berles-Servins nació en 1092, en Berles-au-Bois, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Henri de Berles, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Avicie de Servins, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Nigel d'Aubigny-en-Artois en 1109. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1151, en Aubigny-en-Artois, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 59 años.
